rewritten_requirements: The system shall classify patients based on their social determinants.
The system shall verify patient data entered by the patient with details furnished by hospital medical records.
The system shall notify patients about relevant medical events and health schemes based on their categorized data.
The system shall provide personal health-tracking facilities for patients by assessing individual medical records.
The system shall enable healthcare providers to plan and schedule health worker activities based on patient needs.
The system shall provide data analysis for government officials to assist in implementing intervention schemes to offer medical facilities without conflicts and eliminate health discrepancies.
The system shall register patients with unique credentials and categorize them as patients, health workers, or government authorities.
The system shall provide login functionality for users to access the application using their unique credentials.
The system shall include a logout option for users to log out of the application at any time.
The system shall provide a data entry section for patients to enter their medical and social details, including unique identification details.
The system shall provide a patient dashboard with articles related to the patient's present medical conditions and a search bar to search for specific articles.
The system shall provide a health worker dashboard with informative articles pertaining to their area of specialization.
The system shall provide a health-tracking facility with detailed analytics of patient individual health records, including data synchronization from other health monitoring applications.
The system shall schedule alerts for all users and dispatch them to patients and health workers when an activity is due.
The system shall schedule health worker activities according to analyzed patient requirements, including tracking progress of planned activities.

The system shall analyze data for patterns of medical disparities based on family and community issues and socio-economic determinants, presenting a holistic report accessible to authorized government authorities.
The system shall enable the government to implement health financing schemes with various state-level agencies using analytics data to bring about health equity for affected individuals.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Patient classification based on social determinants
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: One of the main functionalities of the system is a patient classification based on social determinants such as economic backgrounds, health insurance amount received, medical allowances, demographics, age, type of disability and hereditary health information.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Patient data verification by healthcare providers
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The details entered by the patient will be corroborated by the details furnished by the respective hospital medical records of the patients.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Notification of relevant medical events and health schemes to patients
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Another important functionality is to notify the patients about the relevant medical events and health schemes available based on the system’s categorization of the patient’s data.
The system also must provide personal health-tracking facilities for the patients by means of assessing the patients’ individual medical records.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Health worker activity planning and scheduling based on patient needs
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The next function is to enable the healthcare providers such as hospitals and clinics to plan and schedule health worker activity based on the patient’s need.

Consequently, the application should make available the analysis of these data to the government, thereby assisting in the implementation of significant intervention schemes to offer medical facilities without any conflicts and eliminate the health discrepancies.
Registration: The users of the application are registered with unique credentials and categorized as patients, health workers or a government authority.
Login: The login section is for the users to login to the application using the unique credentials provided during the registration phase.
Logout: The logout option is included in the user’s user interface enabling the user to log out of the application at any time the user wants to.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Data entry section for medical and social details
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Data Entry: A section to enter all the medical details as well as the various social and economic details including unique identification details for the patient user and registered identification details for the health workers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Patient dashboard with articles and search bar
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Patient Dashboard: A catered dashboard for every patient user with articles relating to the patient’s present medical conditions and the possible ailments that the patient may be prone to, obtained by analysis of the patient’s medical records. It also incorporates a search bar to search for specific articles relating to a medical term.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Health worker dashboard with informative articles
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Health Worker Dashboard: A dashboard for every health worker belonging to every registered medical institution that provides informative articles pertaining to the worker’s area of specialization.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Health tracking facility with analytics and data synchronization
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Health Tracking: A section that provides a health-tracking facility by means of detailed analytics of the patient’s individual health records furnished by the patient as well as the healthcare establishments from where the patient receives active treatment. This section also has provisions to synchronize the data from other health monitoring applications in the user’s device and include them for health tracking.

Alerts are scheduled for all the users and dispatched to the patients whenever an activity is due such as a health checkup or a medical camp and dispatched to the health workers to catch up on a scheduled activity.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Activity scheduling based on patient needs
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Activity Scheduling: Activities of the health workers are scheduled according to the analysed requirements of the patients based on various medical and social factors and the progress of these planned activities can be tracked.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Analytics for patterns of medical disparities
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Analytics: All the exhaustive data that goes into the application is analysed for patterns of medical disparities based on family and community issues and socio-economic determinants and a holistic report of this data is presented in the dashboard accessible to the authorized government authority to be used to bring about the appropriate health interventions.

Using the application’s analytics data, the government should be able to implement substantial schemes to bring forth health equity for all the affected individuals by initiating health financing schemes with various state-level agencies through an authorized section in the application (Figures 25.1–25.12).
